title: nervilia pudica
intro: Nervilia pudica, also known as the shy orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Nervilia pudica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, its rhizomes are used to make herbal supplements, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
